title: xyris filiformis
intro: Xyris filiformis, also known as the slender yellow-eyed grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Xyridaceae. The medicinal properties of Xyris filiformis include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Xyris filiformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Xyris filiformis is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it may also be used in traditional herbal remedies for its various health benefits.
